Class GameSession

java.lang.Object
com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GameSession extends Object implements Serializable
Serializable aggregate of everything needed for one Splendor game in an HTTP session: gem bank counts, closed and open development cards by level, available nobles, players, current turn index, and end-game flags. Stored under "gameSession" for the web app.

Player list order is turn order: index 0 goes first (youngest), the last player is oldest.

See Also:

    GameSession(List<PlayerSetup> playersInTurnOrder, int pointsToWin, int maxTokensPerPlayer, int tokenPerGem, int goldCount)
    Initializes bank token counts and creates Player instances from setup; card and noble lists start empty until WebGameSetupService loads them.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameSession

      public GameSession(List<PlayerSetup> playersInTurnOrder, int pointsToWin, int maxTokensPerPlayer, int tokenPerGem, int goldCount)
      Initializes bank token counts and creates Player instances from setup; card and noble lists start empty until WebGameSetupService loads them.
      Parameters:
      playersInTurnOrder - first = youngest (starts), last = oldest
      pointsToWin - prestige required to trigger the final round
      maxTokensPerPlayer - maximum gems (including gold) a player may hold before returning excess
      tokenPerGem - initial count per non-gold colour in the bank
      goldCount - initial gold tokens in the bank

  • Method Details

    • getTokenCount

      public int getTokenCount(String gemType)
      Parameters:
      gemType - gem colour or "gold" (case-insensitive)
      Returns:
      number of tokens of that type currently in the bank

    • removeTokens

      public void removeTokens(String gemType, int amount)
      Removes tokens from the bank (e.g. when a player takes gems).
      Parameters:
      gemType - gem colour or gold
      amount - positive count to subtract

    • addTokens

      public void addTokens(String gemType, int amount)
      Returns tokens to the bank (e.g. when a player pays for a card or returns excess).
      Parameters:
      gemType - gem colour or gold
      amount - count to add

    • getOpenLevel1

      public ArrayList<Card> getOpenLevel1()
      Returns:
      mutable face-up level-1 row

    • getOpenLevel2

      public ArrayList<Card> getOpenLevel2()
      Returns:
      mutable face-up level-2 row

    • getOpenLevel3

      public ArrayList<Card> getOpenLevel3()
      Returns:
      mutable face-up level-3 row

    • getClosedLevel1

      public ArrayList<Card> getClosedLevel1()
      Returns:
      mutable closed level-1 deck

    • getClosedLevel2

      public ArrayList<Card> getClosedLevel2()
      Returns:
      mutable closed level-2 deck

    • getClosedLevel3

      public ArrayList<Card> getClosedLevel3()
      Returns:
      mutable closed level-3 deck

    • getOpenCardsByLevel

      public ArrayList<Card> getOpenCardsByLevel(int level)
      Parameters:
      level - 1, 2, or 3
      Returns:
      open row for that level, or null if level is invalid

    • getClosedCardsByLevel

      public ArrayList<Card> getClosedCardsByLevel(int level)
      Parameters:
      level - 1, 2, or 3
      Returns:
      closed deck for that level, or null if level is invalid

    • getAvailNobles

      public ArrayList<Noble> getAvailNobles()
      Returns:
      mutable list of nobles still available to visit

    • removeNoble

      public void removeNoble(Noble noble)
      Removes a noble after a player acquires it.
      Parameters:
      noble - tile to remove (by equality in the list)

    • getPlayers

      public ArrayList<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns:
      mutable list of players in turn order

    • getCurrentPlayerIndex

      public int getCurrentPlayerIndex()
      Returns:
      index into getPlayers() for whose turn it is

    • setCurrentPlayerIndex

      public void setCurrentPlayerIndex(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - new current player index (caller must keep in range)

    • advanceToNextPlayer

      public void advanceToNextPlayer()
      Advances currentPlayerIndex circularly to the next player.

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public Player getCurrentPlayer()
      Returns:
      the player whose turn it is

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Returns:
      true once the game has ended

    • setGameOver

      public void setGameOver(boolean gameOver)
      Parameters:
      gameOver - whether the match has finished

    • isFinalRound

      public boolean isFinalRound()
      Returns:
      true after someone has reached getPointsToWin() and the final round is in progress

    • setFinalRound

      public void setFinalRound(boolean finalRound)
      Parameters:
      finalRound - whether the game is in the closing round after hitting the prestige threshold

    • getPointsToWin

      public int getPointsToWin()
      Returns:
      prestige points needed to trigger the final round

    • getMaxTokensPerPlayer

      public int getMaxTokensPerPlayer()
      Returns:
      maximum tokens a player may hold without returning gems
